_comment: iter-3 F6 mitigation: NFC conformance vector. signer_cluster_id contains the precomposed character "é" (NFC form U+00E9). The signer_key_id is sha256(NFC("café"):"1") regardless of whether the producer authored "café" precomposed or "cafe" + combining acute (U+0301) — the deriveSignerKeyId NFC normalization makes both forms collapse to the same hash. Cross-runner authors implementing FR-A2 vectors MUST also NFC-normalize before equivalent sha256 update calls.
